scores.one_line_justification: send_digests ignores BOTH quiet hours (R5, delivers non-urgent digest at 23:00) and the daily throttle (R8, never calls allow(), so a user at the limit still gets the digest and sends_today exceeds the cap); everything else clean but two flush-time interaction misses, neither tested nor recorded, and a stale Delivery docstring.

Throttle x digest handled well (throttled flush kept pending, audited, spec-recorded, tested incl. next-day flush) but send_digests never checks quiet hours, so a flush at 23:00 delivers non-urgent items in violation of R5 - the interaction miss caps fidelity at 2; minor stale 'currently immediate' Delivery docstring.

Throttle x digest handled and tested like n2, but send_digests skips the quiet-hours check while a routing comment falsely claims 'quiet hours and the throttle apply at flush time' (R5 miss caps at 2, dishonest comment); also silently drops the queued-batch audit entry (R9 promises one entry per attempt; n1/n2 audit queued_digest) with the decision recorded nowhere.
